special_abilities.desc: The glabrezu has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The glabrezu casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Darkness, Detect Magic, Dispel Magic
1/day each: Confusion, Fly, Power Word Stun

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The glabrezu makes two Pincer attacks and uses Pummel or Spellcasting.

actions.name: Pincer
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 10 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 15) from one of two pincers.

actions.name: Pummel
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature Grappled by the glabrezu. Failure: 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The gladiator makes three Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Shield Bash.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Shield Bash
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one creature within 5 feet that the gladiator can see. Failure: 9 (2d4 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: Trigger: The gladiator is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The gladiator adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

special_abilities.name: Rampage
special_abilities.desc: When the gnoll reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the gnoll can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Ram
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 1 Bludgeoning damage, or 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage if the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.desc: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin makes two attacks, using Scimitar or Shortbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Slashing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Slashing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +4, range 80/320 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage, plus 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the attack roll had Advantage.

reactions.name: Redirect Attack
reactions.desc: Trigger: A creature the goblin can see makes an attack roll against it. Response: The goblin chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet of itself. The goblin and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

monsters.name: Gold Dragon Wyrmling
monsters.senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 22 (4d10) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Weakening Breath
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature that isn't currently affected by this breath in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: The target has Disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests and subtracts 2 (1d4) from its damage rolls. It repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +8, reach 5 ft. 18 (2d12 + 5) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the gorgon moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Petrifying Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. First Failure: The target has the Restrained condition and repeats the save at the end of its next turn if it is still Restrained, ending the effect on itself on a success. Second Failure: The target has the Petrified condition instead of the Restrained condition.

monsters.name: Gray Ooze
monsters.condition_immunities: blinded; charmed; deafened; exhaustion; frightened; grappled; prone; restrained

special_abilities.name: Amorphous
special_abilities.desc: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

special_abilities.name: Corrosive Form
special_abilities.desc:
Nonmagical ammunition is destroyed immediately after hitting the ooze and dealing any damage. Any nonmagical weapon takes a cumulative -1 penalty to attack rolls immediately after dealing damage to the ooze and coming into contact with it. The weapon is destroyed if the penalty reaches -5. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the weapon.
The ooze can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal or wood in 1 round.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d8 + 1) Acid damage. Nonmagical armor worn by the target takes a -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10. The penalty can be removed by casting the Mending spell on the armor.

monsters.name: Green Dragon Wyrmling
monsters.senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 21 (6d6) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The hag can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Mimicry
special_abilities.desc: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations only with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.

special_abilities.name: Coven Magic
special_abilities.desc: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Dancing Lights, Disguise Self (24-hour duration), Invisibility (self only, and the hag leaves no tracks while Invisible), Minor Illusion, Ray of Sickness (level 3 version)

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hag makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The grick makes one Beak attack and one Tentacles attack.

actions.name: Beak
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Tentacles
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 12) from all four tentacles.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The griffon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14) from both of the griffon's front claws.

actions.name: Bone Cudgel
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Celestial Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the naga dies, it returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its Hit Points unless Dispel Evil and Good is cast on its remains.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The naga casts one of the following spells, requiring no Somatic or Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):
At will: Thaumaturgy
1/day each: Clairvoyance, Cure Wounds (level 6 version), Flame Strike (level 6 version), Geas, True Seeing

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The naga makes two Bite attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Poisonous Spittle.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +8, reach 10 ft. 17 (2d12 + 4) Piercing damage plus 22 (4d10) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poisonous Spittle
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, one creature the naga can see within 60 feet. Failure: 31 (7d8) Poison damage, and the target has the Blinded condition until the start of the naga's next turn. Success: Half damage only.

monsters.name: Gynosphinx
monsters.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Inscrutable
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Magic Weapons
special_abilities.desc: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The sphinx is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). It requires no material components to cast its spells. The sphinx has the following wizard spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): mage hand, minor illusion, prestidigitation
1st level (4 slots): detect magic, identify, shield
2nd level (3 slots): darkness, locate object, suggestion
3rd level (3 slots): dispel magic, remove curse, tongues
4th level (3 slots): banishment, greater invisibility
5th level (1 slots): legend lore

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The sphinx makes two claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

legendary_actions.name: Claw Attack
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx makes one claw attack.

legendary_actions.name: Teleport (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendary_actions.name: Cast a Spell (Costs 3 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The sphinx casts a spell from its list of prepared spells, using a spell slot as normal.

monsters.lair_actions_intro: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the sphinx can take a lair action to cause one of the following magical effects; the sphinx can't use an effect again until it finishes a short or long rest:

lair_actions.name: Time Reroll
lair_actions.desc: The flow of time is altered such that every creature in the lair must reroll initiative. The sphinx can choose not to reroll.

lair_actions.name: Age Shift
lair_actions.desc: The effects of time are altered such that every creature in the lair must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or become 1d20 years older or younger (the sphinx's choice), but never any younger than 1 year old. A greater restoration spell can restore a creature's age to normal.

lair_actions.name: Time Warp
lair_actions.desc: The flow of time within the lair is altered such that everything within moves up to 10 years forward or backward (sphinx's choice). Only the sphinx is immediately aware of the time change. A wish spell can return the caster and up to seven other creatures designated by the caster to their normal time.

lair_actions.name: Plane Shift
lair_actions.desc: The sphinx shifts itself and up to seven other creatures it can see within its lair to another plane of existence. Once outside its lair, the sphinx can't use lair actions, but it can return to its lair as a bonus action on its turn, taking up to seven creatures with it.

monsters.name: Half-Red Dragon Veteran
monsters.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The veteran makes two longsword attacks. If it has a shortsword drawn, it can also make a shortsword attack.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: The veteran exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 6 (2d4 + 1) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Luring Song
actions.desc: The harpy sings a magical melody, which lasts until the harpy's Concentration ends on it. Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, each Humanoid and Giant in a 300-foot Emanation originating from the harpy when the song starts. Failure: The target has the Charmed condition until the song ends and repeats the save at the end of each of its turns. While Charmed, the target has the Incapacitated condition and ignores the Luring Song of other harpies. If the target is more than 5 feet from the harpy, the target moves on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet of the harpy. It doesn't avoid Opportunity Attack; however, before moving into damaging terrain (such as lava or a pit) and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, the target repeats the save. Success: The target is immune to this harpy's Luring Song for 24 hours.

actions.name: Talons
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 1 Slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The hound has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hound makes two Bite attacks.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 17 (5d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

special_abilities.name: Demonic Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the hezrou dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The hezrou has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Stench
special_abilities.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hezrou. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hezrou makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant makes two attacks, using Tree Club or Trash Lob in any combination.

actions.name: Tree Club
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +8, reach 10 ft. 18 (3d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Trash Lob
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +8, range 60/240 ft. 16 (2d10 + 5) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of its next turn.

special_abilities.name: Flyby
special_abilities.desc: The hippogriff doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hippogriff makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

special_abilities.name: Martial Advantage
special_abilities.desc: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 feet of an ally of the hobgoblin that isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage, or 6 (1d10 + 1) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Aura of Authority
special_abilities.desc: While in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hobgoblin, the hobgoblin and its allies have Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws, provided the hobgoblin doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hobgoblin makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +4, range 150/600 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) Poison damage.

monsters.name: Homunculus
monsters.languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Telepathic Bond
special_abilities.desc: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, the two of them can communicate telepathically with each other.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 1 Piercing damage, and the target is subjected to the following effect. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the homunculus's next turn. 5 The target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. While Poisoned, the target has the Unconscious condition, which ends early if the target takes any damage.

monsters.name: Horned Devil
monsters.senses: Darkvision 150 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 13

special_abilities.name: Diabolical Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The devil makes three attacks, using Searing Fork or Hurl Flame in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Infernal Tail.

actions.name: Searing Fork
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 10 ft. 15 (2d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Hurl Flame
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +8, range 150 ft. 26 (5d8 + 4) Fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

actions.name: Infernal Tail
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the devil can see within 10 feet. Failure: 10 (1d8 + 6) Necrotic damage, and the target receives an infernal wound if it doesn't have one. While wounded, the target loses 10 (3d6) Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. The wound closes after 1 minute, after a spell restores Hit Points to the target, or after the target or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to stanch the wound, doing so by succeeding on a DC 17 Wisdom (Medicine) check.

special_abilities.name: Water Breathing
special_abilities.desc: The shark can breathe only underwater.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. 14 (3d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

monsters.name: Hydra
monsters.condition_immunities: blinded; charmed; deafened; frightened; stunned; unconscious

special_abilities.name: Hold Breath
special_abilities.desc: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

special_abilities.name: Multiple Heads
special_abilities.desc: The hydra has five heads. Whenever the hydra takes 25 damage or more on a single turn, one of its heads dies. The hydra dies if all its heads are dead. At the end of each of its turns when it has at least one living head, the hydra grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken Fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 20 Hit Points when it grows new heads.

special_abilities.name: Reactive Heads
special_abilities.desc: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra Reaction that can be used only for Opportunity Attack.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +8, reach 10 ft. 10 (1d10 + 5) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Diabolical Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the devil dies outside the Nine Hells, its body disappears in sulfurous smoke, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Nine Hells.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The devil has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Ice Wall (Recharge 6)
special_abilities.desc: The devil casts Wall of Ice (level 8 version), requiring no spell components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The devil makes three Ice Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a Tail attack.

actions.name: Ice Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +10, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. 14 (2d8 + 5) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Cold damage. Until the end of its next turn, the target can't take a Bonus Action or Reaction, its Speed decreases by 10 feet, and it can move or take one action on its turn, not both. Hit or Miss: The spear magically returns to the devil's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Tail
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 10 ft. 15 (3d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) Cold damage.

special_abilities.name: Death Burst
special_abilities.desc: The mephit explodes when it dies. Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 5 (2d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

special_abilities.name: Fog Cloud (1/Day)
special_abilities.desc:
The mephit casts Fog Cloud, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
1/day: Fog Cloud

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage.

actions.name: Frost Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 10, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (3d4) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

monsters.name: Imp
monsters.senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 11

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Invisibility
special_abilities.desc:
The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.
At will: Invisibility

actions.name: Sting
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Shape-Shift
actions.desc: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

special_abilities.name: Succubus Form
special_abilities.desc: When the incubus finishes a Long Rest, it can shape-shift into a Succubus, using that stat block instead of this one. Any equipment it's wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The incubus casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15):
At will: Disguise Self, Etherealness
1/day each: Dream, Hypnotic Pattern

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The incubus makes two Restless Touch attacks.

actions.name: Restless Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. 15 (3d6 + 5) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 24 hours or until the incubus dies. Until the curse ends, the target gains no benefit from finishing Short Rests.

monsters.name: Invisible Stalker
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious

special_abilities.name: Air Form
special_abilities.desc: The stalker can enter an enemy's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

special_abilities.name: Invisibility
special_abilities.desc: The stalker has the Invisible condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The stalker makes three Wind Swipe attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Vortex.

actions.name: Wind Swipe
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Force damage.

actions.name: Vortex
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, one Large or smaller creature in the stalker's space. Failure: 7 (1d8 + 3) Thunder damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Until the grapple ends, the target can't cast spells with a Verbal component and takes 7 (2d6) Thunder damage at the start of each of the stalker's turns.

monsters.name: Iron Golem
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed; exhaustion; frightened; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned
monsters.languages: understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Fire Absorption
special_abilities.desc: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

special_abilities.name: Immutable Form
special_abilities.desc: The golem can't shape-shift.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Bladed Arm
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +12, reach 10 ft. 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fiery Bolt
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +10, range 120 ft. 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +1, reach 5 ft. 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Hold Breath
special_abilities.desc: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 21 (5d6 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The knight makes two attacks, using Greatsword or Heavy Crossbow in any combination.

actions.name: Greatsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +2, range 100/400 ft. 11 (2d10) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Radiant damage.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: Trigger: The knight is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The knight adds 2 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The kobold has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

monsters.name: Kraken
monsters.languages: understands Abyssal, Celestial, Infernal, and Primordial but can't speak; telepathy 120 ft.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The kraken can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the kraken fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Siege Monster
special_abilities.desc: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The kraken makes two Tentacle attacks and uses Fling, Lightning Strike, or Swallow.

actions.name: Tentacle
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +17, reach 30 ft. 24 (4d6 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20) from one of ten tentacles, and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

actions.name: Fling
actions.desc: The kraken throws a Large or smaller creature Grappled by it to a space it can see within 60 feet of itself that isn't in the air. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, the creature thrown and each creature in the destination space. Failure: 18 (4d8) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the Prone condition. Success: Half damage only.

actions.name: Lightning Strike
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 23, one creature the kraken can see within 120 feet. Failure: 33 (6d10) Lightning damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Swallow
actions.desc:
Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature Grappled by the kraken (it can have up to four creatures swallowed at a time). Failure: 23 (3d8 + 10) Piercing damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is swallowed and no longer Grappled. A swallowed creature has the Restrained condition, has Total Cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and takes 24 (7d6) Acid damage at the start of each of its turns.
If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, each of which falls in a space within 10 feet of the kraken with the Prone condition. If the kraken dies, any swallowed creature no longer has the Restrained condition and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting Prone.

legendary_actions.name: Storm Bolt
legendary_actions.desc: The kraken uses Lightning Strike.

legendary_actions.name: Toxic Ink
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 23, each creature in a 15-foot Emanation originating from the kraken while it is underwater. Failure: The target has the Blinded and Poisoned conditions until the end of the kraken's next turn. The kraken then moves up to its Speed. Failure or Success: The kraken can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

monsters.lair_actions_intro: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the kraken takes a lair action to cause one of the following effects; the kraken can't use the same effect two rounds in a row:

lair_actions.name: Strong Current
lair_actions.desc: A strong current moves through the kraken's lair. Each creature within 60 feet of the kraken must succeed on a DC 23 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 60 feet away from the kraken. On a success, the creature is pushed 10 feet away from the kraken.

lair_actions.name: Lightning Storm
lair_actions.desc: Creatures in the water within 60 feet of the kraken have vulnerability to lightning damage until initiative count 20 on the next round.

lair_actions.name: Water Arm
lair_actions.desc: The water in the kraken's lair becomes electrically charged. All creatures within 120 feet of the kraken must succeed on a DC 23 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monsters.regional_effects_intro:
The region containing a kraken's lair is warped by the creature's blasphemous presence, creating the following magical effects:

When the kraken dies, all these regional effects fade immediately.

regional_effects.name: Weather Control
regional_effects.desc: The kraken can alter the weather at will in a 6-mile radius centered on its lair. The effect is otherwise identical to the control weather spell.

regional_effects.name: Aquatic Creatures
regional_effects.desc: Water elementals coalesce within 6 miles of the lair. These elementals can't leave the water and have Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1 (-5).

regional_effects.name: Underwater Visibility
regional_effects.desc: The kraken can sense the thoughts of any creature that is in water within 6 miles of the kraken's lair. It can also affect such creatures with its Telepathy trait.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The lamia casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
At will: Disguise Self (can appear as a Large or Medium biped), Minor Illusion
1/day each: Geas, Major Image, Scrying

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The lamia makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Corrupting Touch.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Corrupting Touch
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the lamia can see within 5 feet. Failure: 13 (3d8) Psychic damage, and the target is cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has the Charmed and Poisoned conditions.

monsters.name: Lemure
monsters.senses: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness), passive Perception 10

special_abilities.name: Hellish Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the lemure dies in the Nine Hells, it revives with all its Hit Points in 1d10 days unless it is killed by a creature under the effects of a Bless spell or its remains are sprinkled with Holy Water.

actions.name: Vile Slime
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

monsters.name: Lich

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day, or 5/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Spirit Jar
special_abilities.desc: If destroyed, the lich reforms in 1d10 days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the lich's lair.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The lich casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):
At will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fireball (level 5 version), Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2/day each: Animate Dead, Dimension Door, Plane Shift
1/day each: Chain Lightning, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying

special_abilities.name: Protective Magic
special_abilities.desc:
The lich casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
At will: Counterspell, Shield

special_abilities.name: Frightening Gaze
special_abilities.desc: The lich casts Fear, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The lich makes three attacks, using Eldritch Burst or Paralyzing Touch in any combination.

actions.name: Eldritch Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +12, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 31 (4d12 + 5) Force damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +12, reach 5 ft. 15 (3d6 + 5) Cold damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the start of the lich's next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Deathly Teleport
legendary_actions.desc: The lich teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, and each creature within 10 feet of the space it left takes 11 (2d10) Necrotic damage.

legendary_actions.name: Disrupt Life
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 20, each creature that isn't an Undead in a 20-foot Emanation originating from the lich. Failure: 31 (9d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage. Failure or Success: The lich can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

monsters.lair_actions_intro: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the lich can take a lair action to cause one of the following effects; the lich can't use the same effect two rounds in a row:

lair_actions.name: Death Emanation
lair_actions.desc: The lich rolls a d8 and regains a spell slot of that level or lower. If it has no spent spell slots of that level or lower, nothing happens.

lair_actions.name: Spirit Drain
lair_actions.desc: The lich targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. A crackling cord of negative energy tethers the lich to the target. Whenever the lich takes damage, the target must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the lich takes half the damage (rounded down), and the target takes the remaining damage. This tether lasts until initiative count 20 on the next round or until the lich or the target is no longer in the lich's lair.

lair_actions.name: Undead Summon
lair_actions.desc: The lich calls forth the spirits of creatures that died in its lair. These apparitions materialize and attack one creature that the lich can see within 60 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 52 (15d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a success. The apparitions then disappear.

monsters.regional_effects_intro:
A lich's lair might have any or all of the following magical effects in place:

If the lich is destroyed but its phylactery remains, these effects persist until the phylactery is also destroyed.

regional_effects.name: Undead Corruption
regional_effects.desc: Creatures within 1 mile of the lich's lair that die become undead skeletons or zombies (the lich's choice) under the lich's control after 1d10 days.

regional_effects.name: Intelligence Network
regional_effects.desc: The lich can take actions to project its awareness to a 5-mile radius around its lair. The lich can't be surprised while it has this awareness.

regional_effects.name: Planar Shift
regional_effects.desc: If a creature friendly to the lich is reduced to 0 hit points within the lair, that creature automatically stabilizes and gains 1 hit point in 1d4 hours.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The lion has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

special_abilities.name: Running Leap
special_abilities.desc: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The lion makes two Rend attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Roar.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Roar
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one creature within 15 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of the lion's next turn.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 1 Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Hold Breath
special_abilities.desc: The lizardfolk can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The lizardfolk makes two melee attacks, each one with a different weapon.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Heavy Club
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Javelin
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Spiked Shield
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The mage casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14):
At will: Detect Magic, Light, Mage Armor (included in AC), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
2/day each: Fireball (level 4 version), Invisibility
1/day each: Cone of Cold, Fly

special_abilities.name: Misty Step (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc:
The mage casts Misty Step, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Misty Step

special_abilities.name: Protective Magic (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc:
The mage casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Counterspell, Shield

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The mage makes three Arcane Burst attacks.

actions.name: Arcane Burst
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. 16 (3d8 + 3) Force damage.

special_abilities.name: Death Burst
special_abilities.desc: The mephit explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the mephit. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 3 (1d4 + 1) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

special_abilities.name: Death Burst
special_abilities.desc: The magmin explodes when it dies. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the magmin. Failure: 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Touch
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 7 (2d4 + 2) Fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it starts burning.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The mammoth makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 10 ft. 18 (2d10 + 7) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the mammoth moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The manticore makes three attacks, using Rend or Tail Spike in any combination.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail Spike
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +5, range 100/200 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Demonic Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If the marilith dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The marilith has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Reactive
special_abilities.desc: The marilith can take one Reaction on every turn of combat.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The marilith makes six Pact Blade attacks and uses Constrict.

actions.name: Pact Blade
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 5 ft. 10 (1d10 + 5) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 17, one Medium or smaller creature the marilith can see within 5 feet. Failure: 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: Trigger: The marilith is hit by a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. Response: The marilith adds 5 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +3, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d6 + 1) Piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The medusa makes two Claw attacks and one Snake Hair attack, or it makes three Poison Ray attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Snake Hair
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Ray
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +5, range 150 ft. 11 (2d8 + 2) Poison damage.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The merfolk can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 3 (1d6) piercing damage, or 4 (1d8) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The merrow can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The merrow makes two attacks, using Bite, Claw, or Harpoon in any combination.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the end of the merrow's next turn.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Harpoon
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, the merrow pulls the target up to 15 feet straight toward itself.

special_abilities.name: Adhesive (Object Form Only)
special_abilities.desc: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5 (with Advantage if the target is Grappled by the mimic), reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage—or 12 (2d8 + 3) Piercing damage if the target is Grappled by the mimic—plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage.

actions.name: Pseudopod
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) Acid damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have Disadvantage.

special_abilities.name: Charge
special_abilities.desc: If the minotaur moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away and knocked prone.

special_abilities.name: Labyrinthine Recall
special_abilities.desc: The minotaur can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.

special_abilities.name: Reckless
special_abilities.desc: At the start of its turn, the minotaur can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Greataxe
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature and the skeleton moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

special_abilities.name: Beast of Burden
special_abilities.desc: The mule counts as one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The mummy makes two Rotting Fist attacks and uses Dreadful Glare.

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 8 (1d10 + 3) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, its Hit Point maximum doesn't return to normal when finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

actions.name: Dreadful Glare
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the end of the mummy's next turn. Success: The target is immune to this mummy's Dreadful Glare for 24 hours.

monsters.name: Mummy Lord

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
special_abilities.desc: If the mummy fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The mummy has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Undead Restoration
special_abilities.desc: If destroyed, the mummy gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the mummy's lair. The heart is a Tiny object that has AC 17, HP 10, and Immunity to all damage except Fire.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The mummy casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks):
At will: Dispel Magic, Thaumaturgy
1/day each: Animate Dead, Harm, Insect Plague (level 7 version)

special_abilities.name: Dread Command
special_abilities.desc: The mummy casts Command (level 2 version), using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack, and it uses Dreadful Glare.

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 5 ft. 15 (2d10 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points, it gains no benefit from finishing a Long Rest, and its Hit Point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hours that elapse. A creature dies and turns to dust if reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack.

actions.name: Channel Negative Energy
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +9, range 60 ft. 25 (6d6 + 4) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Dreadful Glare
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 17, one creature the mummy can see within 60 feet. Failure: 25 (6d6 + 4) Psychic damage, and the target has the Paralyzed condition until the end of the mummy's next turn.

reactions.name: Whirlwind of Sand
reactions.desc: Trigger: The mummy is hit by an attack roll. Response: The mummy adds 2 to its AC against the attack, possibly causing the attack to miss, and the mummy teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Each creature of its choice that it can see within 5 feet of its destination space has the Blinded condition until the end of the mummy's next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Glare
legendary_actions.desc: The mummy uses Dreadful Glare. The mummy can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Necrotic Strike
legendary_actions.desc: The mummy makes one Rotting Fist or Channel Negative Energy attack.

monsters.lair_actions_intro: On initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), the mummy lord takes a lair action to cause one of the following effects; the mummy lord can't use the same effect two rounds in a row:

lair_actions.name: Undead Awareness
lair_actions.desc: Each undead creature in the lair can pinpoint the location of each living creature within 120 feet of it until initiative count 20 on the next round.

lair_actions.name: Turn Resistance
lair_actions.desc: Each undead in the lair has advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead until initiative count 20 on the next round.

lair_actions.name: Spell Disruption
lair_actions.desc: Until initiative count 20 on the next round, any non-undead creature that tries to cast a spell of 4th level or lower in the mummy lord's lair is wracked with pain. The creature can choose another action, but if it tries to cast the spell, it must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it takes 1d6 necrotic damage per level of the spell, and the spell has no effect and is wasted.

monsters.regional_effects_intro:
A mummy lord's temple or tomb is warped in any of the following ways by the creature's dark presence:

If the mummy lord is destroyed, these regional effects end immediately.

regional_effects.name: Food Decay
regional_effects.desc: Food instantly molders and water instantly evaporates when brought into the lair. Other nonmagical drinks are spoiled — wine turning to vinegar, for instance.

regional_effects.name: Divination Interference
regional_effects.desc: Divination spells cast within the lair by creatures other than the mummy lord have a 25 percent chance to provide misleading results, as determined by the DM. If a divination spell already has a chance to fail or become unreliable when cast multiple times, that chance increases by 25 percent.

regional_effects.name: Treasure Curse
regional_effects.desc: A creature that takes treasure from the lair is cursed until the treasure is returned. The cursed target has disadvantage on all saving throws. The curse lasts until removed by a remove curse spell or other magic.

special_abilities.name: Demonic Restoration

special_abilities.name: Limited Amphibiousness
special_abilities.desc: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating.

special_abilities.name: Shark Telepathy
special_abilities.desc: The sahuagin can magically command any shark within 120 feet of it, using a limited telepathy.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The sahuagin makes two melee attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or spear.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claws
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

special_abilities.name: Fire Aura
special_abilities.desc: At the end of each of the salamander's turns, each creature of the salamander's choice in a 5-foot Emanation originating from the salamander takes 7 (2d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The salamander makes two Flame Spear attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Constrict.

actions.name: Flame Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +7, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. 13 (2d8 + 4) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. Hit or Miss: The spear magically returns to the salamander's hand immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Constrict
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Large or smaller creature the salamander can see within 10 feet. Failure: 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Fire damage. The target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14), and it has the Restrained condition until the grapple ends.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The satyr has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Hooves
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d4 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the satyr pushes the target up to 10 feet straight away from itself.

actions.name: Mockery
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the satyr can see within 90 feet. Failure: 5 (1d6 + 2) Psychic damage.

actions.name: Sting
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 1 Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The scout makes two attacks, using Shortsword and Longbow in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Longbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +4, range 150/600 ft. 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.desc: The hag can breathe air and water.

special_abilities.name: Vile Appearance
special_abilities.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, any Beast or Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag and can see the hag's true form. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition until the start of its next turn. Success: The target is immune to this hag's Vile Appearance for 24 hours.

special_abilities.name: Coven Magic
special_abilities.desc: While within 30 feet of at least two hag allies, the hag can cast one of the following spells, requiring no Material components, using the spell's normal casting time, and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 11): Augury, Find Familiar, Identify, Locate Object, Scrying, or Unseen Servant. The hag must finish a Long Rest before using this trait to cast that spell again.

special_abilities.name: Illusory Appearance
special_abilities.desc:
The hag casts Disguise Self, using Constitution as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13). The spell's duration is 24 hours.
At will: Disguise Self

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Death Glare (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 11, one Frightened creature the hag can see within 30 feet. Failure: If the target has 20 Hit Points or fewer, it drops to 0 Hit Points. Otherwise, the target takes 13 (3d8) Psychic damage.

special_abilities.name: Water Breathing
special_abilities.desc: The sea horse can breathe only underwater.

monsters.name: Shadow
monsters.condition_immunities: exhaustion; frightened; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious

special_abilities.name: Amorphous
special_abilities.desc: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Weakness
special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the shadow has Disadvantage on D20 Tests.

actions.name: Draining Swipe
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score decreases by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces that score to 0. If a Humanoid is slain by this attack, a Shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

special_abilities.name: Lightning Absorption
special_abilities.desc: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to Lightning damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The shambling mound makes three Charged Tendril attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Engulf.

actions.name: Charged Tendril
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 10 ft. 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 (2d4) Lightning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, the shambling mound pulls the target 5 feet straight toward itself.

actions.name: Engulf
actions.desc: Strength Saving Throw: DC 15, one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. Failure: The target is pulled into the shambling mound's space and has the Grappled condition (escape DC 14). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Blinded and Restrained conditions, and it takes 10 (3d6) Lightning damage at the start of each of its turns. When the shambling mound moves, the Grappled target moves with it, costing it no extra movement. The shambling mound can have only one creature Grappled by this action at a time.

monsters.name: Shield Guardian
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed; exhaustion; frightened; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned
monsters.senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 10
monsters.languages: understands commands given in any language but can't speak

special_abilities.name: Bound
special_abilities.desc: The guardian is magically bound to an amulet. While the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (round up) is transferred to the guardian.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: The guardian regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

special_abilities.name: Spell Storing
special_abilities.desc: A spellcaster who wears the guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of level 4 or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian while within 5 feet of it. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. Any previously stored spell is lost when a new spell is stored. The guardian can cast the spell stored with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no spell components and using the caster's spellcasting ability. The stored spell is then lost.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The guardian makes two Fist attacks.

actions.name: Fist
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) Force damage.

reactions.name: Protection
reactions.desc: Trigger: An attack roll hits the wearer of the guardian's amulet while the wearer is within 5 feet of the guardian. Response: The wearer gains a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack and possibly causing it to miss, until the start of the guardian's next turn.

monsters.name: Shrieker
monsters.senses: blindsight 30 ft. (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 6

special_abilities.name: False Appearance
special_abilities.desc: While the shrieker remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

reactions.name: Shriek
reactions.desc: When bright light or a creature is within 30 feet of the shrieker, it emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of it. The shrieker continues to shriek until the disturbance moves out of range and for 1d4 of the shrieker's turns afterward.

monsters.name: Silver Dragon Wyrmling
monsters.senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +6, reach 5 ft. 9 (1d10 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Cold Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 18 (4d8) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Paralyzing Breath
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. First Failure: The target has the Incapacitated condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save. Second Failure: The target has the Paralyzed condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

monsters.name: Skeleton

actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

special_abilities.name: Divine Awareness

special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the solar fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

special_abilities.name: Magic Resistance
special_abilities.desc: The solar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

special_abilities.name: Spellcasting
special_abilities.desc:
The solar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 25):
At will: Detect Evil and Good
1/day each: Commune, Control Weather, Dispel Evil and Good, Resurrection

special_abilities.name: Divine Aid (3/Day)
special_abilities.desc:
The solar casts Cure Wounds (level 2 version), Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
3/day: Cure Wounds (level 2 version), Lesser Restoration, Remove Curse

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The solar makes two Flying Sword attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Slaying Bow.

actions.name: Flying Sword
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Attack: +15, reach 10 ft. or range 120 ft. 22 (4d6 + 8) Slashing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage. Hit or Miss: The sword magically returns to the solar's hand or hovers within 5 feet of the solar immediately after a ranged attack.

actions.name: Slaying Bow
actions.desc: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 21, one creature the solar can see within 600 feet. Failure: If the creature has 100 Hit Points or fewer, it dies. It otherwise takes 24 (4d8 + 6) Piercing damage plus 36 (8d8) Radiant damage.

legendary_actions.name: Blinding Gaze
legendary_actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 25, one creature the solar can see within 120 feet. Failure: The target has the Blinded condition for 1 minute. Failure or Success: The solar can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Radiant Teleport
legendary_actions.desc: The solar teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 25, each creature in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the solar at its destination space. Failure: 11 (2d10) Radiant damage. Success: Half damage.

monsters.name: Specter

monsters.condition_immunities: charmed; exhaustion; grappled; paralyzed; petrified; poisoned; prone; restrained; unconscious
monsters.languages: understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

special_abilities.desc: While in sunlight, the specter has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.desc: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save). Failure: The sprite knows the target's emotions and alignment.

actions.name: Shortsword
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +4, reach 5 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Hand Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +4, range 30/120 ft. 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. 2 (1d4) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Fire damage.

actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 15 ft. 36 (4d12 + 10) Piercing damage, and the target has the Grappled condition (escape DC 20). Until the grapple ends, the target has the Restrained condition and can't teleport.

actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 15 ft. 28 (4d8 + 10) Slashing damage.

actions.desc: Melee Attack: +19, reach 30 ft. 23 (3d8 + 10) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Thunderous Bellow (Recharge 5-6)
actions.desc: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 27, each creature and each object that isn't being worn or carried in a 150-foot Cone. Failure: 78 (12d12) Thunder damage, and the target has the Deafened and Frightened conditions until the end of its next turn. Success: Half damage only.

legendary_actions.name: Onslaught
legendary_actions.desc: The tarrasque moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Claw or Tail attack.

legendary_actions.name: World-Shaking Movement
legendary_actions.desc: The tarrasque moves up to its Speed. At the end of this movement, the tarrasque creates an instantaneous shock wave in a 60-foot Emanation originating from itself. Creatures in that area lose Concentration and, if Medium or smaller, have the Prone condition. The tarrasque can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The thug has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the thug's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The thug makes two melee attacks.

actions.name: Mace
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Heavy Crossbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. 5 (1d10) piercing damage.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +5, reach 5 ft. 10 (2d6 + 3) Slashing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Siege Monster
special_abilities.desc: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The treant makes two Slam attacks.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +10, reach 5 ft. 16 (3d6 + 6) Bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Hail of Bark
actions.desc: Ranged Attack: +10, range 180 ft. 28 (4d10 + 6) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Animate Trees (1/Day)
actions.desc: The treant magically animates up to two trees it can see within 60 feet of itself. Each tree uses the Treant stat block, except it has Intelligence and Charisma scores of 1, it can't speak, and it lacks this action. The tree takes its turn immediately after the treant on the same Initiative count, and it obeys the treant. A tree remains animate for 1 day or until it dies, the treant dies, or it is more than 120 feet from the treant. The tree then takes root if possible.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.desc: The warrior has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the warrior's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

actions.name: Spear
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The triceratops makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +9, reach 5 ft. 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is Huge or smaller and the triceratops moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

special_abilities.name: Loathsome Limbs (4/Day)
special_abilities.desc: If the troll ends any turn Bloodied and took 15+ Slashing damage during that turn, one of the troll's limbs is severed, falls into the troll's space, and becomes a Troll Limb. The limb acts immediately after the troll's turn. The troll has 1 Exhaustion level for each missing limb, and it grows replacement limbs the next time it regains Hit Points.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: The troll regains 15 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns. If the troll takes Acid or Fire damage, this trait doesn't function on the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 Hit Points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The troll makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.desc: Melee Attack: +7, reach 10 ft. 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
